title: Bread
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, Albert Lewin, Charles G. Norris
actors: Mae Busch, Robert Frazer, Pat O'Malley
plot: To relieve the burden placed on their mother, Alice Sturgis (Wanda Hawley) marries and has several children, while her independent sister, Jeanette (Mae Busch), goes to work as a stenographer. Eventually, she is forced to marry a ...
